{{Infobox character
| name = Grandmaster Naraka
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|produce red fireflies, summon a head that looks like a jet-black crocodile's head on a long, serpentine neck, Asphodel mist-binder, contact the denizens of Naraka with her mind}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Grandmaster}}{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|, avatar of her Territory}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Asphodel mist-binder}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Naraka]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

''See also: [[Grandmaster Naraka Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Grandmaster [[Naraka]] is an elderly woman and a high-ranking leader who oversees her own [[Territory]]. Described as appearing extremely aged, hunched, and shriveled, she is rumored to be over a century old. She is often seen wearing distinctive dark red lenses or scarlet spectacles, which she uses to assist her vision. As a Grandmaster, she has served as a teacher for [[Alin]] since his arrival in [[Enosh]] and possesses the ability to communicate mentally with the inhabitants of her [[Territory]]. Her role involves managing complex rules regarding summons, which in her domain require a sacrifice of physical pain. Throughout various conflicts, she has demonstrated significant authority and power, including the ability to command guards and utilize specialized hand gestures for summoning. Despite her frail physical appearance, she has shown a willingness to face extreme danger or even sacrifice her [[life]] to achieve political goals, such as bringing down [[Damasca]]. Her history is marked by significant physical changes and past betrayals, including an escape from the [[Queen of Damasca]] that resulted in a scarred wrist and a hand transformed into a black, flaming claw. She holds strong philosophical views regarding the nature of different [[Territories]] and the moral complexities of [[Incarnations]].}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is [[Alin]]'s teacher and is over one hundred years old.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7">''House of Blades'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] wears thick, dark red lenses that she calls glasses.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] told [[Alin]] that the only way to become a [[Traveler]] is to Travel.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] has sentries posted on the other side.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A gnarled-faced Grandmaster in [[Enosh]], [[Naraka]] is a rumored centenarian and an [[Asphodel]] mist-binder who once had a granddaughter serving as a [[Naraka Traveler]]. Her right hand was marked in her [[Territory]] decades ago, and she is known for producing red fireflies from her hands and summoning a jet-black crocodile head on a long, serpentine neck. Following a journey through the [[Gate to Elysia]] that left her eyes almost entirely white and her hands mangled, she was dragged to [[Elysia]] for healing, ultimately losing the stump of her right arm. Now a [[Traveler]] with only one remaining hand, she waited outside the silver doors wearing glasses and claimed to have shed her old self to become an avatar of her [[Territory]]. After burning the [[Tree]] in [[Cana]], she declared that the [[Incarnations]] are free and maintains the ability to contact the denizens of [[Naraka]] with her mind.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">27</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is a Grandmaster in [[Enosh]] and is rumored to be over one hundred years old.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] had a granddaughter who was a [[Naraka Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] has a gnarled face.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] has a banner above her featuring a clawed fist clutching a ball of flame on a red background.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]]'s right hand was marked in her [[Territory]] decades ago.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Naraka]] is a Grandmaster.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is a character who can produce red fireflies from her hands.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] has a glowing red hand.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is associated with red fireflies.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] has experience with [[Endross]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] can summon a head that looks like a jet-black crocodile's head on a long, serpentine neck.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]]'s hands were mangled, torn, and half-burnt.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is a woman in need of help.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] lost the stump of her right arm.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]]'s left hand survived the trip through the [[Gate to Elysia]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]]'s eyes were almost completely white.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] was dragged to [[Elysia]] for healing.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] has one remaining hand.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] shook off [[Grandmaster Naraka]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is an [[Asphodel]] mist-binder.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is a Grandmaster who waited outside the silver doors.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] stated that the [[Incarnations]] are free.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] wears glasses.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] claims to have shed her old self to become an avatar of her [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] burned the [[Tree]] in [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] can contact the denizens of [[Naraka]] with her mind.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|An old woman with straggly white hair, cracked red spectacles, and a [[Naraka Traveler]]'s brand on her palm, Grandmaster [[Naraka]] accompanied [[Eliadel]] on a mission to [[Enosh]]. During this journey, she provided the descriptions necessary to map the region, though her very existence cast a dark shadow over [[Alin]]'s thoughts. While standing upon the red stones of [[Naraka]] beyond the Gate, she maintained complete self-control while staring at [[Alin]] through the portal. After being captured and held bound and gagged in a camp, she remained silent when [[Leah]] ordered a prisoner to be punished. It was eventually revealed that she had betrayed the [[Queen of Damasca]], triggering a transformation where her body twisted into a hunched, serpentine shape with pale eyes that turned orange. In this form, her single hand became a shriveled black claw wreathed in orange flame, her canines elongated into fangs, and a spiked, red pebbled tail emerged.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">16</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is with [[Eliadel]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is an old woman with straggly white hair and cracked red spectacles.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] possesses a [[Naraka Traveler]]'s brand on her palm.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] provided descriptions used to draw a map of [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is a one-handed woman.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The thought of [[Grandmaster Naraka]] blackens [[Alin]]'s thoughts.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] stands beyond the Gate on red stones of [[Naraka]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is in control of herself while staring at [[Alin]] through the [[Naraka Gate]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] was on a mission to [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] is currently bound, gagged, and guarded in the camp.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] did not protest when [[Leah]] ordered a prisoner punished.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] betrayed the [[Queen of Damasca]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]]'s right hand is a shriveled black claw crawling with orange flame.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]]'s canines elongate into fangs.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]]'s transformation involves her body twisting and stretching into a hunched, serpentine form with pale white eyes that turn orange like live coals.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] has a red, pebbled tail with spikes on the end.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|she always wore thick lenses over her eyes, colored a dark red. She called them her “glasses,” but they didn’t look to be made out of any glass that Alin had ever seen.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Grandmaster Naraka has sentries posted on the other side," Gilad replied.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Allow me to tend to these two, Eliadel. I have some experience with Endross."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“You see?” Grandmaster Naraka said. “It’s our victory. The Incarnations are free.”<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“I can contact the denizens of Naraka with my mind,” Grandmaster Naraka said.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
